# Acme Shop

Acme Shop is an online retailer of consumer electronics and home goods.

## Coverage Period

Acme Shop electronics ship with a standard manufacturer warranty lasting one year from the date of purchase. The warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship under normal use, while accidental damage, liquid exposure, and unauthorized repairs are excluded.

[Source: warranty.md#coverage-period]

## Warranty Claim

A warranty claim is filed by submitting the order number and a fault description through the support portal. An advisor issues a prepaid return label, and the defective unit is repaired or replaced at no charge once the fault is verified. Replacement units inherit the remainder of the original warranty rather than a new one-year term.

[Source: warranty.md#warranty-claim]
